summary.original: Read, search, and manipulate Git repositories through structured MCP tools.
summary.zhCN: 在隔离沙箱仓库中查看状态、差异、历史，并完成安全的暂存与提交。

description.original: A Model Context Protocol server providing tools to read, search, and manipulate Git repositories programmatically via LLMs.
description.zhCN: 这是 Model Context Protocol 官方参考实现，提供 git_status、git_diff、git_log、git_add、git_commit 等结构化 Git 工具。Agent-OPT 将仓库锁定在 `var/runtime/git-sandbox`，Web 不接受宿主任意路径，写操作只作用于该隔离仓库。

author.name: Model Context Protocol a Series of LF Projects, LLC.

evidence.note: PyPI metadata confirms package identity, version, MIT license, and official repository path.
Official component path documents the Git MCP server tools and repository argument.
Repository license file supplies the applicable MIT text referenced by the component package.

license.evidence: PyPI metadata and the official servers repository both state MIT; Agent-OPT invokes the upstream package without vendoring its source.

description.original: Inspect working tree and index status for the sandboxed repository.
description.zhCN: 查看隔离仓库的工作区与暂存区状态。

description.original: Show unstaged, staged, or revision diffs and read commit history.
description.zhCN: 查看未暂存、已暂存或相对目标的差异，并读取提交历史。

description.original: Stage sandbox-relative files and create commits inside the isolated repository only.
description.zhCN: 只对沙箱相对路径执行暂存，并在隔离仓库内创建提交。

description.original: List, create, and checkout branches within the sandbox repository.
description.zhCN: 在沙箱仓库内列出、创建和切换分支。

notes: The adapter launches one fixed Python module with a fixed sandbox repository path.
Web clients never supply repo_path; the adapter injects the sandbox absolute path after validation.
git_add only accepts sandbox-relative file paths and rejects absolute or parent traversal paths.
Revision, date-filter, and branch inputs reject option-like values, control characters, and invalid Git ref structures before launch.

requirements: Project virtual environment installed from requirements-mcp.txt

notes: High developer value with local, credential-free verification.
Sandboxing is mandatory because the upstream tool otherwise accepts arbitrary repo_path values.
Git command names, HEAD, and branch identifiers remain in original technical form.

tests.evidence: Vitest launched mcp-server-git 2026.7.10 over stdio, discovered its fixed tool set, and returned live status from an isolated repository.
A temporary repository exercised all 12 exposed tools: status, unstaged/staged/revision diffs, log, show, branch listing, add, commit, reset, branch creation, and checkout.
Empty commit messages, invalid sandbox-relative inputs, malformed branch names, option-like revisions, and option-like date filters were rejected before upstream invocation.
Absolute paths and parent traversal were rejected; client repo_path values were overwritten with the sandbox root; ref and revision schemas blocked option/control-character injection.
Playwright chromium opened GitWorkspace, ran git_status, and observed repository status text in the result panel.
